# v0.3.1 baseline fixtures

This directory is the single canonical fixture directory for follow-on schema
and CLI contract tests. Tasks 0125 and 0128, and later compatibility tests,
should reference `tests/fixtures/v0.3.1-baseline/` rather than copying these
artifacts elsewhere.

Contents:

- `snapshots/`: generated CLI snapshots for help/version plus JSON commands on
  a freshly initialized empty project and a synthetic representative project.
- `db/v0.3.0-schema-7.sqlite3`: an empty, synthetic database initialized by
  `pcl 0.3.0`. v0.3.0 and v0.3.1 both use schema version 7, so the baseline
  migration smoke is intentionally a no-op compatibility check.

The snapshots are generated by `tests/baseline_fixture_tools.py`; do not edit
them by hand. `test_baseline_snapshots_are_reproducible_and_committed` generates
two independent directories, requires a byte-for-byte zero diff, and compares
the result with the committed files. The normalizer replaces ISO timestamps,
absolute project paths, UUIDs, and 40/64-character hexadecimal hashes.

The database contains no goals, features, stories, tests, tasks, evidence,
personal information, or real-project content. It was generated from the
`v0.3.0` tag with `pcl init` and then copied here as an immutable input fixture.

## Intended changes since v0.3.1 freeze

- 2026-07-10 — `snapshots/representative-context-check-json.json` intentionally
  changed so `context check --json` always includes the additive
  `master_trace_context` preflight block for task targets. This is the intended
  contract change from task 0132 and follows
  `docs/master-trace-intent-index.md`; it is not a v0.3.1 regression.
